MINI MINUTES: This matter is now in the Group Harley 29 as a consolidated case. The lead case is Sifford vs. Raybestos Manhattan 301712. Please refer to the lead case 301712 for information on daily occurrence of this case except for the actual disposition on this individual case. The Group Harley 29 is trailing in Room 608 Judge TMason with 2 days notice to the parties involved to appear for hearing.
